content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
P.O. Box 807 • 428 J Street • Sacramento, CA 95812-0807
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886

March 4, 2002

Shirley Bianchi, Supervisor
Board of Supervisors
San Luis Obispo County
County Government Center
Room 370
San Luis Obispo, CA 93408-2040

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-01-169

Dear Ms. Bianchi:

This correspondence is written confirmation that the Fair Political Practices Commission ("FPPC") has withdrawn your July 5, 2001, request for advice under the provisions of the Political Reform Act¹. You have advised the litigation that created a potential conflict of interest for you was resolved by agreement. Therefore, written advice is not necessary.

Should you have any additional questions regarding this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: Lawrence T. Woodlock
Senior Commission Counsel, Legal Division

LTW:jg
Enclosure

¹ Government Code sections 81000-91014. Commission regulations appear at Title 2, sections 18109-18997, of the California Code of Regulations.
